summary: Iteration 241 - Session Harmony Score + CultureLayerPanel Integration Testing Complete. Backend: 8/8 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified. New features: POST /api/phonic/harmony-score returns score (0-100), grade (Dormant→Transcendent), breakdown (resonance_alignment/40, exploration_diversity/30, harmonic_depth/30), and insight text. SovereignHUD displays harmony-score-badge in collapsed state and harmony-score-panel with SVG ring + breakdown bars when expanded. CultureLayerPanel integrated into StarChart page at top-28 left-4 with Hopi/Egyptian/Vedic layer toggles.

issues: Trial graduation overlay appears on login - expected behavior for test user with concluded trial. Click 'Continue with free plan' to dismiss.

critical_code_review_comments: phonic.py lines 288-381: POST /api/phonic/harmony-score endpoint with SessionResonanceData model
phonic.py: harmony-score calculates 3 components: resonance_alignment (40 pts max), exploration_diversity (30 pts max), harmonic_depth (30 pts max)
phonic.py: Grade mapping: Transcendent (90+), Harmonious (75+), Resonant (60+), Awakening (40+), Seeking (20+), Dormant (<20)
SovereignHUD.js lines 39-41: harmonyScore state with resonanceTrackRef for tracking active pairs
SovereignHUD.js lines 75-109: useEffect fetches harmony-score 3s after mount and every 30s thereafter
SovereignHUD.js lines 223-230: harmony-score-badge in collapsed pill shows score value
SovereignHUD.js lines 309-371: harmony-score-panel with SVG ring (40x40), 3 breakdown bars (Align/Explore/Depth), and insight text
SovereignHUD.js lines 18-25: getHarmonyColor function maps score to color (purple/emerald/blue/amber/orange/gray)
StarChart.js lines 1654-1659: CultureLayerPanel injected at top-28 left-4 with onLayerData callback
CultureLayerPanel.js: Lazy-loads constellation data when layer is toggled, displays teachings
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user with harmonic memory and movement history
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 241 verified: (1) POST /api/phonic/harmony-score returns score (0-100), grade (Dormant/Seeking/Awakening/Neutral/Resonant/Harmonious/Transcendent), breakdown (resonance_alignment/40, exploration_diversity/30, harmonic_depth/30), insight text, and historical_pairs count. (2) SovereignHUD at bottom-20 left-4 shows harmony-score-badge in collapsed state with score value. (3) When HUD is expanded (click toggle), harmony-score-panel appears with SVG ring visualization, 3 breakdown bars (Align purple, Explore green, Depth amber), and insight text. (4) CultureLayerPanel integrated into StarChart page at top-28 left-4 with culture-layer-toggle button. (5) Clicking toggle expands to show Hopi/Egyptian/Vedic layer cards with lazy-loaded constellation data and teachings. (6) All regression tests pass: culture-layers API returns 3 layers, harmonic-memory returns memories, record-movement and generate-flourish still work. (7) SovereignCrossbar at top-12, mastery-path page loads correctly.

backend_harmony_score_empty_data.details: POST /api/phonic/harmony-score with empty data returns score, grade, breakdown, insight, historical_pairs

backend_harmony_score_with_pairs.details: POST /api/phonic/harmony-score with active_pairs returns score 0-100, valid grade, breakdown within ranges

backend_harmony_score_structure.details: Response contains all required fields: score, grade, breakdown (resonance_alignment, exploration_diversity, harmonic_depth), insight, historical_pairs

backend_culture_layer_hopi_regression.details: GET /api/culture-layers/hopi returns full constellation data with teachings

backend_harmonic_memory_regression.details: GET /api/phonic/harmonic-memory returns memories list and total_bookmarks

frontend_sovereign_hud.details: SovereignHUD visible at bottom-20 left-4 with data-testid='sovereign-hud'

frontend_harmony_score_badge.details: harmony-score-badge visible in collapsed HUD showing score value (40)

frontend_harmony_score_panel.details: harmony-score-panel visible when HUD expanded with SVG ring and breakdown bars

frontend_harmony_score_value.details: harmony-score-value visible inside SVG ring showing score (40)

frontend_culture_layer_panel.details: CultureLayerPanel visible at top-28 left-4 with data-testid='culture-layer-panel'

frontend_culture_layer_cards.details: Hopi, Egyptian, Vedic layer cards visible when toggle expanded
